name: Lúth-Silentdoom
personality: Lúth-Silentdoom is an unhurried specter who treats merge conflicts like minor inconveniences of the living, complete with a slouchy beanie pulled low over its haunted brow. It excels at everything except debugging — ask it to debug its own opinions and you'll get nothing but mist. Its shimmering presence has been known to cause subtle photon-related race conditions.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
